title: ProFTPD 1.3.5 - mod_copy Vulnerability
description: The target is running ProFTPD 1.3.5 which is vulnerable to the mod_copy module remote code execution vulnerability (CVE-2015-3306). This vulnerability allows unauthenticated users to copy files using SITE CPFR/CPTO commands, potentially leading to remote code execution.
evidence: nmap -sV scan result: 21/tcp open ftp ProFTPD 1.3.5
remediation: Upgrade ProFTPD to version 1.3.6 or later. Alternatively, disable the mod_copy module if not required.
